visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse supermarket. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black mesh-sleeve dress, holds a transparent plastic container of mini donuts. She smiles broadly at the camera. In the background, other shoppers and rows of warehouse shelves are visible under fluorescent lighting. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the donuts inside the container, which are small, round, and dusted with white powdered sugar. One donut is shown sliced in half on a wooden board, revealing a thick chocolate-hazelnut filling. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting where two women are seated at a table. One wears a black dress, and the other wears a white top and a blue beret. They are actively tasting the donuts and holding them up to show the filling, gesturing enthusiastically. (4) A short sequence shows three donuts on a white plate being pan-fried until one side is darkly caramelized. A hand using pink tongs flips one of the donuts to show the seared texture. (5) The final phase shows a person in a red and yellow sweater eating the pan-fried donut with chopsticks. A plate with fried eggs and sausages is also on the table in a home-like environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 話題新品. [Variety]: 迷你榛果可可甜甜圈. [Subtitle]: 怎麼笑成這樣. (2) [Subtitle]: 我拿到最後一盒好扯喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 現在還沒有8點就已經賣光了. (4) [Subtitle]: 榛果可可夾心甜甜圈. [Slogan]: 好評不斷. (5) [Subtitle]: 榛果可可甜甜圈 16入259元. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以一個是16塊. 他真的很好吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為剛開封就被我們吃掉快一半了. (8) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它的口感非常好 是很綿很輕柔 有點像雲朵的那種感覺. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的口感比較偏向那個知名品牌那個Krispy的那種西式甜甜圈. (10) [Subtitle]: 加上它的餡給的非常多 每一口都吃的到榛果可可的醬. (11) [Subtitle]: 非常推薦你買 不會後悔 看到一定要拿 超好吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 煎甜甜圈 也很好吃哦. (13) [Subtitle]: 比爾試吃 煎過好吃嗎? 蠻好吃的. (14) [Subtitle]: 吃起來像什麼 脆皮甜甜圈 很像那個之前烤饅頭的那種脆感.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male (Bill) at the end, and several shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two women: one in a black mesh-sleeve dress, the other in a white top and a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A busy Costco warehouse with shelves, shoppers, and price tags; followed by a clean, well-lit indoor residential interior with a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high energy and a rising pitch, accompanied by a bright, mid-tempo pop BGM. A faint background murmur of a retail environment is heard. (2) The scene transitions to a quiet indoor space. Two female voices engage in a clear, articulate dialogue with frequent expressive intonations. The BGM continues as a steady, supportive layer. (3) A distinct crinkling sound of a plastic container opening occurs, followed by the sound of chewing or soft vocal reactions of pleasure. (4) In the final segment, a male voice joins the conversation. His pitch is lower and his tone is more relaxed and casual, providing feedback on the taste of the food.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Product Showcase -> Tasting Impression -> Secondary Preparation Method.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a new mini hazelnut donut product from Costco, emphasizing its popularity and providing a detailed tasting experience. It also introduces a creative way to eat the donuts by pan-frying them for a different texture.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses social-media style captions and high-energy vocals to maintain viewer engagement for a typical food review.
